name: create-ucode
description: An initializer for ucode projects on OpenWrt

scripts.test: T=$(mktemp -d) && node index.js $T/pure-ucode --template pure-ucode --maintainer "Test Bot <bot@example.com>" && node index.js $T/c-mod --template c-mod --maintainer "Test Bot <bot@example.com>"; EC=$?; rm -rf $T; exit $EC
